query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%vitest%' OR name LIKE '%__vitest%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vitest_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE 'Sample Project%' OR name LIKE 'Test%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sample_count
FROM projects;
